text: Juliet, I have got the routing layer fully integrated. Want to test the end-to-end flow?
Yes. Let me also tell you, Tybalt presented a competing proposal today at our board meeting.
He wants Capulet Industries to build their own mesh routing from scratch. It would take months.
Meanwhile we have got a working prototype in two days. The Verona Platform is the better path.
Agreed. Angela is helping me block out calendar time so Tybalt does not notice.
